response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive senior-level experience in software development, leadership, and architecture, with a strong background in open-source technologies, Linux, and system design. His leadership roles, technical depth, and strategic thinking align well with the Head of Development role. The main concerns are limited German proficiency (only basic) and less direct experience in UML modeling, though his architectural contributions and open-source projects mitigate this.
strengths: Extensive senior-level experience in software development, architecture, and leadership across multiple industries
Strong background in open-source technologies, Linux, and modern software systems (Dlang, Node.js, TypeScript)
Proven track record in mentoring teams, strategic thinking, and rapid technical assessment
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic (B1/B2 level), which falls short of the required C1
Limited explicit mention of UML expertise or formal modeling experience in the resume
While leadership experience is strong, it is mostly at the team/engineering level rather than executive-level strategy
